items.title: Billions of meals at risk due to Iran war, says fertiliser boss
items.summary: A shortage of fertiliser due to the Iran conflict could reduce crop yields and push prices higher, says the boss of Yara.

items.title: Hegseth says clock paused on deadline to seek approval for Iran war
items.summary: The US defence secretary says the timer for the president to report to Congress "pauses or stops" in a ceasefire.

items.title: Violence in Australian town after arrest of man over girl's murder
items.summary: Unrest took place outside hospital where man suspected of murdering a five-year-old girl was being treated.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 成都鬧區開車蓄意衝撞1死11傷  駕駛手持尖刀被逮
items.summary: 中國四川省成都市今天傍晚驚傳開車蓄意衝撞事件，一輛轎車在鬧區突然加速衝撞正在過馬路的行人。駕駛隨後像找獵物般繼續行凶，又高速撞倒一輛機車。行凶男子最後被逼停下車，還手持尖刀。事件造成1死11...…

items.title: 美軍中央司令部傳向川普簡報 擬對伊朗發動最後一擊
items.summary: 美國福斯新聞（Fox News）今天報導，美軍中央司令部（CENTCOM）司令古柏已向總統川普簡報，提出對伊朗發動「最後一擊」的潛在選項。  古柏（Brad Cooper）是在白宮戰情室...…

items.title: 打造「AI優先作戰部隊」 五角大廈機密系統部署輝達等7大公司技術
items.summary: 美國五角大廈1日表示，已與7家具領先地位的人工智慧（AI）公司達成協議，將這些公司的先進AI技術，部署戰爭部（國防部）機密網路，協助美軍在複雜作戰環境中，加速資訊整合和掌握戰場...…
